title: Minie Ball

params.name: Minie Ball
params.description:
On Oct 30, 1849, Minie invented a special bullet which had a great impact on future generations.

The Minie ball has a small diameter that is unsuitable for ordinary rifled guns. With a lead skirting on the exterior of the bullet and a hollow cavity, the skirt of the bullet would expand under the pressure of gunpowder deflagration, allowing the bullet to gain a strong rotational force. During the Franco-Prussian War, the old Minie rifle suffered a heavy defeat on the battlefield and became obsol …
